channel.title: Blogs on Datta Nimmaturi
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Datta Nimmaturi

item.title: Know your LoRA
item.description: Rethink LoRA initilisations What is LoRA LoRA has been a tremendous tool in the world of fine tuning, especially parameter efficient fine tuning. It is an easy way to fine tune your models with very little memory requirements. LoRA was first introduced in this paper by Hu et al. The premise of LoRA is, upon fine tuning, the change in weights of the matrices are of low rank in comparison with the original matrix To exploit this, LoRA adds an adapter which we can train while having the initial model weights frozen.
